name: Riley Exploration Permian, Inc.
summary: Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. (REPX) is an oil and gas company operating in the Permian Basin. Based on the limited excerpt available (an auditor consent from BDO USA, P.C.), the company files annual reports on Form 10-K and has registration statements on Form S-3 and S-8, indicating public equity activity. Specific operational details are not provided in this excerpt.

partnerships.description: Independent registered public accounting firm providing audit and attestation services for Riley Exploration Permian, Inc.
